explanation: Better means improved but not resolved
Stable chronic disease is still active
Controlled means managed but still active
No longer indicates resolved — NOT negated
h/o is clinical shorthand for history of
c/o means complains of — active symptom
s/p means status post — past procedure
Well-controlled means managed but still present
has no is a compound negation cue
no active is a compound negation cue
3 years ago is a past temporal marker
Since this morning is a present temporal marker
